code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur: Int = 0
  mut have: Bool = false
  mut neg: Bool = false
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i: Int = 0
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    else if b == 45 and not have
      neg = true
    else
      if have
        let v = if neg
          0 - cur
        else
          cur
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
        cur = 0
        have = false
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut out: String = ""
  mut sum: Int = 0
  mut j: Int = 0
  let m = nums.len()
  while j < m
    match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      sum = sum + v
      if j == 0
        out = "#{sum}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{sum}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
